title: Data Management Specialist (Python_SQL_PromptEngineering_UAT_DataGovernance)
description:
Maltem Asia is seeking a Data Management Specialist for a Wealth Management Client based in Singapore.

Summary:

  • Supporting the Enterprise Data Services project, you will perform the Data Management aspect for the enterprise data distribution channel. 
  • You will possess good business knowledge of the financial industry. 
  • Experience with programming will be an added advantage.

Key responsibilities:

  • Work closely with business stakeholders, data engineers and platform team to implement and support data distribution solution.
  • Leveraging on technology, to design an optimal onboarding process with clear visibility of the various life cycle of a product.
  • Contribute, influence, and validate the design of data distribution solutions to ensure they meet both business and operational needs
  • Perform data access control operations to ensure data ingested and distributed comply with enterprise data governance and data handling standards.
  • Document the business requirements clearly.
  • Perform user acceptance testing on the data distribution channel and ensure that it meets the requirements.
  • Participate in building new product capabilities and shaping the new features.
  • Identify opportunities for continuous improvement in assigned area of work.

 Skillsets-Must-Have:

  • Possess a degree in Computer Science/Information Technology or related fields.
  • Proficient in:
  • Python
  • SQL
  • Prompt Engineering
  • Possess ownership mindset to the problem and be outcome driven.
  • Good problemsolving skills with ability to provide sound, feasible solution to problems; be resourceful and conduct fact findings and thorough analysis.
  • Strong advocate of the product, understand how to resolve business problem with the current capabilities.
  • Proactively identify area of improvement in processes, communication and generating insights for better decision-making.
  • Ability to bridge technical terminologies and business use cases.
  • Ability to understand technology landscape, SDLC and IT processes and standards to successfully translate problems (both data and technical) to product requirements.
  • Ability to conduct thorough analysis, fact findings and design processes and complement with requirements for automation to reduce any manual work.
  • Analyze and understand the trade-offs inherent in differing scenarios of a solution outcome.
  • Ability to clearly communicate analysis in solution proposals and recommendations.
  • Ability to breakdown problem to execution step-by-step, leverage on AI and prompt engineering.

postedCompany.description:
Maltem is a community of 1200 passionate individuals dedicated to Innovation, new Technologies and Digital Transformation projects.

Founded in 2001 and located in 10 different countries, our footprint covers : 

France

Singapore

Hong Kong

Philippines

Luxembourg

Belgium

Madagascar

New-York

Montréal

Morocco


Our expertise consists of 16 years market knowledge into Business Organization, Digital Practices, Data Science, Data Engineering, Data Management & Innovation.
